titleStmt.title: SII 7.66: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 66. (A.R. No. 62 of 1900). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīThe date may be read better as 4 10 4. . tribhu vaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 4vatu piḷḷaiyār kulottuṅkacoḻac campuvarāyar Uṭaiyār
tūṇāṇṭāṟku tevatānamāka ciyamaṅkalattu Iṭṭa nilam paṉṉiruvelikku taṭi Uḷvarierikiḻ peruntūmpaṭi ciraman kuḻi 5 100 3 10 Itan vaṭakku kamukukoḷḷi kuḻi 2 100 6 10
kiḻakku namaśśi vāyam kuḻi 3 100 3 10 Itan vaṭakkuc cātticeṟu taṭiThe word taṭi is denoted by the symbol ta�.2- ṉāl kuḻiThis symbol stands for kuḻi. 7 100 3 10 taṭi 1 viṭṭu vaṭakku valliṭumpan taṭi 2- ṉāl kuḻi 7 100 4 10 Iṅkuviṭṭu vaṭakku Āttikkuṇṭil kuḻi 100 2 10
Itan vaṭakuṇṭil kuḻi 8 10 Itan vaṭapuñci kuḻi 2 100 2 10 Itan teṟku kuṇṭil kuḻi 6 10 Itan meṟkuThis perhaps stands for meṟku or mel.kuṇṭil kuḻi 100 10 vāykkālukku vaṭaThis symbol denotes vaṭakku (?).kuṇṭil kuḻi 6 10 vatikku kiḻakkuMay be an abbreviation for kiḻakku. Āticcanceṟu kuḻi 8 100 5 10 Itan kiḻakku cāṇaṉ
tiruttu kuḻi 100 8 10 Itan vaṭakku nan=ta muḻān kuḻi 3 100 6 10 Iṅku viṭṭu kiḻakku Aimpatiṟṟaṅkāyi kuḻi 3 100 Itan kiḻakku pāppānpaṭṭi kuḻi 3 100 7 10 Itan kiḻakku pappanappaṉ kuḻi 900 Iṅkuviṭṭu naṭuvilvatikku kiḻakku murukkañceṟu kuḻi 3 100 Itan kiḻakku tāṉṟi
ceṟu kuḻi 2 100 4 10 Itan kiḻ tānṟikkuṇṭil kuḻi 100 9 10 Itan kiḻakku pirāṅkuṇṭil kuḻi 2 100 4 10 Iṅkuviṭṭu tenmeṟkuvākaicceṟu kuḻi 6 100 Itan teṟkuThis symbol stands for teṟku. pūvañceṟu kuḻi 3 100 6 10 Itan vaṭakiḻakku teṅkañceṟu kuḻi 2 100 8 10 Itan vaṭakku maṇṇilikaḻuval kuḻi 100 Itan kiḻakku veppaṅkuṇṭil kuḻi 100 3 10 Itan kiḻakku
vañcikaḻuval kuḻi 28 10 Itan teṟku tevarkaṇṭapperuñceṟu kuḻi 2 100 6 10 Itan kiḻaku kuṇṭil taṭi 2- ṉāl kuḻi 6 10 Itan vaṭa karikkuṇṭil kuḻi 100 5 10 Itan vaṭakku Accañceṟu kuḻi 3 100 Itan teṟkup peruṅkuṭiceṟu kuḻi 4 100 2 10 Itan kiḻakku Ālañceṟu kuḻi 3 100 Itan kiḻakku
Āttikkuṇṭil taṭi 2- ṉāl kuḻi 2 100 7 10 Itan kiḻakku Āttikkuṇṭil taṭi 2- ṉāl kuḻi 100 5 10 Itan vaṭakku na(ṉ)n=ti muḻānkuṇṭil Uṭpaṭa kuḻi 5 100 Itan teṟku malaiyāḷaṉkuṇṭil taṭi 2- ṉāl kuḻi 3 100 Itan kiḻakku Aṭaicceṟṟaṅkuṇṭil kuḻi 710 Itan kiḻakku paruppaikkaḻuval kuḻi 2 100 Ita
n vaṭa nan=ti muḻānkuṇṭil kuḻi 710 Itan vaṭakāl kaṇṭarātittattu taṭi palaviṉāl kuḻi 5 100 Itan teṟku Ettacceṟu kuḻi 5 100 Itan kiḻakku kuṇṭil kuḻi 8 10 Itan vaṭakku kuṇṭil kuḻi 23 10 Itan teṟku kuṇṭil kuḻi 12 10 Itan kiḻakku kuṇṭil kuḻi 100 4 10 Itan kiḻakku kuṇṭil kuḻi 100 2 10 Itan kiḻakku Āttic
ceṟu kuḻi 3 100 Itan meṟku muṭappaḷikkuṇṭil kuḻi 12 10 Iṅkuviṭṭu meṟku Eruvampoki kuḻi 5 100 Itan meṟku Eruvampoki kuḻi 3 100 Itan meṟku Accaṅkuṇṭil kuḻi 100 7 10 Iṅkuviṭṭu meṟku pekkaḻuval kuḻi 3 100 Itan teṟku cericātti kuḻi 5 100 Itan kiḻakku cericātti kuḻi 6 100 Itan kiḻakku maṉṟāṭikuṇṭil taṭi 3
ṉāl kuḻi 3 100 Itan kiḻakku koyilāṉpaṭṭi kuḻi 8 100 Itan kiḻakku koyilāṉpaṭṭi kuḻi 2 100 5 10 Itan kiḻakku paḷḷicceṟu kuḻi 5 100 Itan kiḻakku velañceṟu kuḻi 2 100 8 10 Itan kiḻakku velañceṟu kuḻi 2 100 4 10 Itan kiḻakku pavaḻattāḷ kuḻi 24 10 Itan kiḻakku p pavaḻattāḷ kuḻi 100 4 10 Itan kiḻakkup pavaḻattāḷ kuḻi 3 100 Itan vaṭameṟku nāvalcceṟu kuḻi 4 100 I
ṅkuviṭṭu meṟku matakañceṟu kuḻi 3 100 Itan meṟku matakañceṟu kuḻi 3 100 Itan teṟku maṉṟāṭikuṇṭil taṭi 3- ṉāl kuḻi 3 100 4 10 Itan teṟku kurāmpaḷḷam kuḻi 2 100 Itan meṟku kurāmpaḷḷam kuḻi 2 100 Itan meṟku kuṇṭil Uḷpaṭa kuḻi 3 100 Iṅkuviṭṭu vaṭakku niraṟukālkuṇṭil kuḻi 4 10 Āka vāci Eṟṟi kuḻi 2 10000 4 1000
ṉāl nilam paṉṉiraṇṭu veliyum paḻa(n)n=te vatānam nilam Eṭṭu veliyum Āka nilam Irupatu veliyum mañcaḷpaṭṭil Inṉāyanār tevatānam nilam Iraṇṭarai veliyum Āka nilam 2 10 2 I Itu paṉmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 7.66 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
